title: Acoridium longibulbum
taxonomy: Acoridium longibulbum is a species within the plant family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. It is a type of epiphytic orchid that grows in tropical regions. Further classification of Acoridium longibulbum includes its genus and species within the orchid family. Acoridium longibulbum is a member of the tribe Angraecinae. The specific classification of Acoridium longibulbum includes its binomial nomenclature, Acoridium longibulbum.

It is believed to have antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which may contribute to its potential in treating skin infections and wounds. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to alleviate various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.
